subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort was built by Rana Kumbha?
question_hi: राजस्थान में राणा कुम्भ ने किस मंगल बनाई?
explanation_en: Rana Kumbha built the Kumbhalgarh Fort, which is known for its impregnable nature and its association with the legendary Rajput warrior Maharana Pratap.
explanation_hi: राणा कंगोल, राज्य के विश्वभूमि की भारत में एक वर्गों के प्रधान शिवरों के संत महराना प्रतिरोध के कामना क्या था?
D_en: What was the purpose of the Kumbhalgarh Fort built by Maharana Pratap?
explanation_hi: महराना प्रतिरोध के कामना क्या था?
explanation_en: What was the purpose of the Kumbhalgarh Fort built by Maharana Pratap?
question_en: What was the purpose of the Kumbhalgarh Fort built by Maharana Pratap?
question_hi: महराना प्रतिरोध के कामना क्या था?
